flowchart_lr_basic:
flowchart LR
    A[Start] --> B{Decision}
    B -->|Yes| C[Process]
    B -->|No| D[End]
    C --> D
flowchart_tb_nodes:
flowchart TB
    A([Stadium]) --> B[[Subroutine]]
    B --> C[(Database)]
    C --> D((Circle))
    D --> E>Asymmetric]
flowchart_subgraph:
flowchart TB
    subgraph one
        a1-->a2
    end
    subgraph two
        b1-->b2
    end
    subgraph three
        c1-->c2
    end
    one --> two
    three --> two
    two --> c2
flowchart_styled:
flowchart LR
    id1(Start)-->id2(Stop)
    style id1 fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style id2 fill:#bbf,stroke:#f66,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
flowchart_edge_types:
flowchart LR
    A-->B
    A--- C
    A-.->D
    A==>E
    A--text-->F
    A-.text.->G
flowchart_christmas:
flowchart TD
    A[Christmas] -->|Get money| B(Go shopping)
    B --> C{Let me think}
    C -->|One| D[Laptop]
    C -->|Two| E[iPhone]
    C -->|Three| F[Car]
flowchart_nested_subgraph:
flowchart LR
    subgraph TOP
        direction TB
        subgraph B1
            direction RL
            i1 -->f1
        end
        subgraph B2
            direction BT
            i2 -->f2
        end
    end
    A --> TOP --> B
    B1 --> B2
flowchart_special_chars:
flowchart LR
    a["This is the (text) in the box"] --> b["Result: A->B"]
    b --> c["C & D together"]
flowchart_long_chain:
flowchart LR
    A --> B --> C --> D --> E --> F --> G
    G --> H --> I --> J
flowchart_multipath:
flowchart TD
    Start --> A & B & C
    A --> D
    B --> D
    C --> D
    D --> End
sequence_basic:
sequenceDiagram
    Alice->>Bob: Hello Bob, how are you?
    Bob-->>Alice: Great!
    Alice-)Bob: See you later!
sequence_loop:
sequenceDiagram
    Alice->John: Hello John, how are you?
    loop Every minute
        John-->Alice: Great!
    end
sequence_alt:
sequenceDiagram
    Alice->>Bob: Hello Bob
    alt is sick
        Bob->>Alice: Not so good
    else is well
        Bob->>Alice: Feeling fresh
    end
    opt Extra message
        Bob->>Alice: Thanks for asking
    end
sequence_notes:
sequenceDiagram
    participant John
    Note right of John: Text in note
    John->Alice: Text
    Note over Alice,John: A typical interaction
sequence_activation:
sequenceDiagram
    Alice->>+John: Hello John, how are you?
    Alice->>+John: John, can you hear me?
    John-->>-Alice: Hi Alice, I can hear you!
    John-->>-Alice: I feel great!
sequence_autonumber:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    Alice->>John: Hello John
    loop Healthcheck
        John->>John: Fight hypochondria
    end
    Note right of John: Rational thoughts!
    John-->>Alice: Great!
    John->>Bob: How about you?
    Bob-->>John: Jolly good!
sequence_par:
sequenceDiagram
    par Alice to Bob
        Alice->>Bob: Hello guys!
    and Alice to John
        Alice->>John: Hello guys!
    end
    Bob-->>Alice: Hi Alice!
    John-->>Alice: Hi Alice!
sequence_actors:
sequenceDiagram
    actor Alice
    actor Bob
    Alice->>Bob: Hi Bob
    Bob->>Alice: Hi Alice
    Alice->>Bob: Can I ask you something?
    Bob-->>Alice: Sure!
class_associations:
classDiagram
    classA --|> classB : Inheritance
    classC --* classD : Composition
    classE --o classF : Aggregation
    classG --> classH : Association
    classI -- classJ : Link
    classK ..> classL : Dependency
    classM ..|> classN : Realization
class_multiplicity:
classDiagram
    Customer "1" --> "*" Ticket
    Student "1" --> "1..*" Course
    Galaxy --> "many" Star : Contains
er_basic:
erDiagram
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
er_optional:
erDiagram
    PERSON }|..|{ PERSON : "is married to"
    PERSON ||--o{ ADDRESS : "lives at"
    ADDRESS ||--|{ CITY : "is in"
state_basic:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Still
    Still --> [*]
    Still --> Moving
    Moving --> Still
    Moving --> Crash
    Crash --> [*]
state_fork:
stateDiagram-v2
    state fork_state <<fork>>
    [*] --> fork_state
    fork_state --> State2
    fork_state --> State3
    state join_state <<join>>
    State2 --> join_state
    State3 --> join_state
    join_state --> State4
    State4 --> [*]
state_notes:
stateDiagram-v2
    State1: The state with a note
    note right of State1
        Important information
    end note
    State1 --> State2
    State2 --> State1
state_choice:
stateDiagram-v2
    state if_state <<choice>>
    [*] --> IsPositive
    IsPositive --> if_state
    if_state --> False: if n < 0
    if_state --> True: if n >= 0
gantt_basic:
gantt
    title A Gantt Diagram
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Section
    A task          :a1, 2024-01-01, 30d
    Another task    :after a1, 20d
gantt_sections:
gantt
    title Project Schedule
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Design
    Wireframes      :des1, 2024-01-01, 14d
    Mockups         :des2, after des1, 14d
    section Development
    Backend         :dev1, after des1, 30d
    Frontend        :dev2, after des2, 21d
    section Testing
    QA              :qa1, after dev1, 14d
gantt_milestones:
gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    title Adding GANTT milestones
    section A
    Completed task      :done, des1, 2024-01-06, 2024-01-08
    Active task         :active, des2, 2024-01-09, 3d
    Future task         :des3, after des2, 5d
    section Critical
    Crit done task      :crit, done, 2024-01-06, 24h
    Crit active task    :crit, active, 3d
    Crit task           :crit, 5d
gantt_excludes:
gantt
    title Gantt with weekends excluded
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    excludes weekends
    section Section
    A task          :a1, 2024-01-01, 10d
    Another task    :after a1, 10d
gantt_tick_interval:
gantt
    title Gantt with tick interval
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    tickInterval 1week
    section Section
    Long task           :2024-01-01, 60d
    Another long task   :2024-02-01, 30d
